result.summary: The page is mostly usable, but several elements appear clipped or overlapped, suggesting horizontal overflow and insufficient spacing for fixed navigation.

issues.description: Game tiles in the right column are cut off by the screen edge across multiple sections, making the layout look horizontally overflowed on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid or carousel sizing so cards fit the viewport, or make the horizontal scrolling behavior clearer with consistent partial-card spacing and no page-level overflow.

issues.description: The bottom sticky navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the main content equal to the height of the sticky navigation so content can scroll fully above it.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right; the 'Hot Games' tab is only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the horizontal category scroller has proper padding and snap behavior, or reduce tab widths so the visible area does not look accidentally cropped.

issues.description: The hero carousel arrows sit partly on the screen edge and appear visually clipped, especially the right arrow.
issues.suggestion: Move carousel controls slightly inward and ensure they have adequate touch target spacing from the viewport edge.
